_meta.title: Txt2Img Hairstyle Catalog Thumbnail
_meta.description: Pure text-to-image catalog portrait (no PhotoMaker, no real face). Default prompt is w1 French wave. Edit positive/negative CLIP nodes to match other templates from templates_comfyui.json. Same graph used by scripts/generate_thumbnails.py.

inputs.text: photograph of a woman with long wavy French wave hairstyle, soft romantic curls, elegant feminine look, glossy flowing hair, professional photography, portrait, detailed hair texture, Asian woman, studio lighting, neutral background
short hair, straight hair, messy hair, wig, hat, sunglasses, blurry, low quality, deformed, ugly, text, watermark
